author: hpasic
description: Mobile-first gym workout tracker. Log sets, reps, and weights with speed-optimized UX. Data stored as markdown in your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: LiftOff

name: LiftOff

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Release 0.2.1 — clear no-static-styles scorecard flag by @hpasic in https://github.com/hpasic/obsidian-liftoff/pull/15


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/hpasic/obsidian-liftoff/compare/0.2.0...0.2.1

releases.author: hpasic
releases.description:
Sharper feedback: immediate cues on how the current set stacks up against history, and a clean readable record after the workout.

## What's new

- **Set-type tags** — tap the set number to cycle warmup / working / drop / failure. Warmups and drop sets are excluded from PR and volume calcs.
- **Personal-record detection** — a 🏆 badge flashes the moment a working set beats your best heaviest weight, estimated 1RM (Epley), or single-set volume. Bests update mid-workout, so back-to-back PRs both light up.
- **Post-workout summary** — every saved note gets a `## Summary` section: duration, working sets, total volume, and the PRs you hit.
- **Duration exercises** — a count-up stopwatch for static holds like planks, dead hangs, and L-sits.
- **Per-exercise notes** — a free-text field on each exercise, saved into the workout note.

## Fixes & polish

- Cleaned up the set grid header (removed stray empty boxes; plain column labels) and widened the set-type button.
- Fixed a timer leak when re-rendering a running duration row, a PR-best rollback on un-checking a set, and duration exercises inflating the working-set count.

**Install:** download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below, or update from Community Plugins.
releases.name: 0.2.0 — Sharper feedback

releases.author: hpasic
releases.description:
## Highlights

- **Fix:** Weight input now accepts `,` as a decimal separator (EU keyboards). Storage stays on `.` for markdown portability.
- **Feature:** Per-row × button to remove individual sets.

## Under the hood

- CI: pin Node version via `.nvmrc` and restore `npm ci` for lockfile-enforced reproducibility on releases.

releases.author: hpasic
releases.description:
First minor release post-submission. All changes target mobile UX and community-review compliance.

## What's new

- **Rest timer follows the active exercise card** instead of being stuck at the top of the workout view (#3). On a long workout, the timer always appears next to the set you just finished — never scrolls off-screen.
- **Finish workout button no longer hidden behind the mobile toolbar** (#2). Bottom actions get safe-area + toolbar clearance on iOS/Android.
- **Exercise picker fully usable on mobile** (#6). The last items are scrollable above the on-screen keyboard, and the picker now opens scrolled to the top with the search field visible.
- **GET READY countdown** — timer exercises now start with a 10-second countdown so you can get into position before the first work interval.

## Compatibility

- Minimum Obsidian version bumped to **1.7.2** (we now use `Workspace.revealLeaf` and `Vault.createFolder` introduced in 1.7.2 / 1.4.0 respectively — they were already in use against the old `1.0.0` floor, so this just makes the requirement honest).

## Known issues

- #1 — losing in-progress workout state after switching notes on mobile. Tracked for **0.1.2**; needs a persistence design pass.
releases.name: 0.1.1 — Mobile fixes + GET READY countdown

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release with base functionality:

- Start workouts from templates or empty
- Log sets with weight, reps, and unit tracking
- Pre-fill data from previous sessions
- Rest timer with configurable presets
- Interval timer for timed exercises
- Exercise library
- Workout history saved as markdown
- Mobile-first UI
